_meta.coverage_note: Top 10 raw signals from ESA sources — unanalysed

items.title: Strategic autonomy: A quantum leap forward on European total defence
items.summary: New article analyzes how strategic autonomy is expanding EU's foreign and security policy into total defence, trade, energy, and cyber domains to reduce external dependencies. Relevant to EU defence integration and building resilience against geopolitical instability.
items.domain_relevance: Advances EU strategic autonomy in defence and multi-domain resilience

items.title: Strategic autonomy and European competitiveness: Security now prioritized
items.summary: European Parliament study urges EU to prioritize military and economic security for strategic autonomy, addressing defence dependencies and pushing industrial policy for scale. Highlights need for bilateral trade amid stalled multilateralism.
items.domain_relevance: Focuses on EU defence integration and economic security autonomy

items.title: EU Strategic Autonomy Radar reveals Europe's geopolitical weaknesses
items.summary: CEP's radar shows Europe losing leading positions in critical supply chains, underscoring vulnerabilities in economic and fiscal policy domains. Calls for enhanced strategic autonomy measures.
items.domain_relevance: Exposes supply chain risks to European strategic autonomy

items.title: European strategic autonomy implications for Ukraine peace talks
items.summary: Analysis discusses how rising European defence spending boosts deterrence and confidence, impacting Ukraine negotiations amid strategic autonomy push. Relevant to EU defence integration.
items.domain_relevance: Links EU autonomy to geopolitical deterrence and negotiations

items.title: EEAS reports new hybrid threat assessment targeting EU institutions
items.summary: EEAS publishes update on hybrid threats including disinformation campaigns against European institutions. Highlights ongoing FIMI operations from state actors.
items.domain_relevance: Directly addresses hybrid threats and FIMI on EU bodies

items.title: Hybrid CoE releases report on foreign interference in EU elections
items.summary: New research from Hybrid CoE details foreign interference tactics in recent European politics, focusing on influence operations. Relevant to hybrid threats domain.
items.domain_relevance: Covers foreign interference in European politics

items.title: ECFR analysis: EU defence integration accelerates post-summit
items.summary: ECFR examines recent EU summit outcomes pushing defence integration and strategic autonomy initiatives. Stresses capability building needs.
items.domain_relevance: Tracks progress in EU defence integration

items.title: Politico EU: Cyber incident hits European Parliament networks
items.summary: Report details suspected foreign-linked cyber attack on EU institutions, amid rising hybrid threats. Investigated as potential FIMI operation.
items.domain_relevance: Hybrid threat incident targeting EU institutions

items.title: DFRLab uncovers Russian FIMI network targeting EU leaders
items.summary: Atlantic Council DFRLab exposes ongoing foreign information manipulation targeting European political figures. Includes technical evidence of operations.
items.domain_relevance: FIMI and foreign interference in EU politics

items.title: NATO warns of hybrid threats to European strategic infrastructure
items.summary: NATO issues alert on hybrid attacks against critical EU infrastructure, urging defence integration. Ties to broader strategic autonomy efforts.
items.domain_relevance: Hybrid threats impacting EU strategic autonomy
